rows.claim: Exact uploaded WeAll v2.0 First Draft human-readable specification source; not an implementation-completion claim.
rows.reviewer: document identity validated by compiler; implementation review remains pending

rows.claim: Clean checkout reproduces Milestone 1 derivatives
rows.truth_boundary: Evidence supports a scoped claim only; it does not activate protocol authority by itself.

rows.claim: Milestone 1 compiler coverage and validation behavior
rows.truth_boundary: Evidence supports a scoped claim only; it does not activate protocol authority by itself.

truth_boundary: The exact uploaded v2.0 First Draft PDF is retained and hash-bound. Its extracted full-scope registers control W1 human-machine equality. Structural compiler coverage does not prove runtime correctness, independent review, interoperability, capacity, or production activation.
